mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications(user_id, type, title, message, is_read) VALUES(#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, COALESCE(#{read}, 0))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, type, title, message, is_read AS `read`, created_at AS createdAt FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1, read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM employee WHERE id = #{employeeId} AND user_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT u.id FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.role_key = #{roleKey} AND u.enabled = 1
